name: @forgeax/engine-graphics-extras
description: Pure-logic graphics-adjacent modules -- text glyph layout + mesh bake, tilemap bit encoding, and video playback -- for forgeax-engine (Tier 2.3 -- extracted from @forgeax/engine-runtime).

fps.reason: pure-logic glyph/tilemap/video modules, no runtime canvas; fps reported by hello-* apps that consume them

bench.reason: glyph layout + mesh bake run at text-change time, tile-bit codec is O(1) per cell; no per-frame hot path warranting a CI micro-benchmark

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; smoke gate covered by tilemap-object-layer / video-texture / text hello-* apps that consume these modules

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; graphics-extras cluster extracted from runtime in feat-20260705-runtime-tier2-decomposition
